repo_clean_at_audit: CLEAN at b87f4cb when the audit began (Phase 0, verified). The working tree now contains only the audit's own new artifacts (exp_preflight.py, PREFLIGHT_*.json/md). No historical artifact was overwritten or amended.
P1_status: RESOLVED -- OUTCOME P1-B. The accessible output DID deviate (1 step, t=53, channel 2). '14' is the SPAN from the swap to the last deviating step, not a count. 'Uninterrupted behaviour' is WITHDRAWN and replaced by: 'pre-replacement accessible behaviour was recovered after a bounded 14-step transient; continuity was NOT exact at every intermediate step.'

P1_detail.statement: The accessible output DID deviate: on 1 step (t=53, channel 2). The figure 14 is the SPAN from the swap to the last deviating step, not a count of deviating steps. Pre-replacement accessible behaviour was recovered after that bounded transient; continuity was NOT exact at every intermediate step. 'Uninterrupted' is withdrawn.

P2_status: PASS -- GROUND TRUTH IS INDEPENDENT. 18/18 prospective comparisons reproduced by a privileged full-state path that never imports fingerprint.py, decides by EXACT EQUALITY of raw engine traces, and uses no distance, no block structure, no radii and no verdict rule of the instrument. Labels were declared from CONSTRUCTION and committed at b87f4cb BEFORE the prospective run.
P2_shared_assumption_declared: The two paths share the DECLARED NUISANCE MODEL (clock phase, internal latency) -- they must, because both measure the same world and those are the same two nuisances. They share nothing else.
P2_audit_defects_found_and_fixed_in_the_: a single common cyclic shift cannot absorb a phase difference and a latency difference simultaneously
T_SIG=128 truncated the aligned block of the longer-latency system (a window shorter than the response -- the D-067 defect, reappearing in my own audit)
non-responding rows aligned to the window start leak phase and latency (the same defect the instrument had already found and fixed in its own development)
P3_status: NOT EXECUTED. The frozen fingerprint protocol contains NO partition gate (verified: no occurrence of partition / lobe / alias / bifurcation / observer_relative / object count / replication / duplication in FINGERPRINT_FREEZE_MANIFEST.json). No partition stress test covering the seven required cases exists anywhere in the repository. Classified honestly as an UNEXECUTED BOUNDED DIAGNOSTIC that is NOT part of the fingerprint qualification. No retrospective PASS is fabricated. It would have to be executed WITHIN any droplet pilot, because the pilot's within/between logic is partition-dependent by construction.
P4_status: FAIL -- RAISED BY THE AUDIT, NOT REQUESTED. THE FROZEN INSTRUMENT IS NOT DEFINED ON THE DROPLET'S ACCESSIBLE OBSERVABLE.

P4_detail.instrument_response_representation: uint8 arrays; dev = (obs != bas) by EXACT inequality; per-block normalized HAMMING distance. Hamming presupposes DISCRETE SYMBOLS.
P4_detail.droplet_accessible_observable: `uptake` = dt*g0*rho*N*qq*(1+beta*sigma): a CONTINUOUS float field of order 1e-3, never 0/1.
P4_detail.if_cast_to_uint8: every sample truncates to 0 -> every droplet's fingerprint is identical -> UNIVERSAL FALSE SAMENESS.
P4_detail.if_compared_as_floats: exact inequality fires on every sample -> every droplet is DIFFERENT from every other AND from its own later self -> UNIVERSAL FALSE DIFFERENCE.
missing_from_the_freeze: any quantization / thresholding rule for a continuous observable
any tolerance epsilon or continuous metric
any mapping from the frozen binary probe amplitudes {0,1} to N / c field units
P4_detail.why_this_is_a_FAIL_and_not_an_adapter: Each missing rule is a FREE PARAMETER that materially controls the within/between separation the pilot is meant to test. Choosing them now is defining the instrument, and a patched instrument cannot inherit the prospective qualification of the unpatched one.

abstention_rules: responsiveness == 0 for either system -> INDETERMINATE (silence is not a fingerprint)
the instrument has NO verdict SAME; d <= r_continuity -> INDISTINGUISHABLE_UNDER_REPERTOIRE (an equivalence class, not an individual)
known_implementation_reuse_in_the_prospe: P_STATE (fsm_gate) and P_LATCH (reg_delay) reuse DEVELOPMENT implementations. Declared before the run. Seven of ten systems use implementations never fingerprinted.
unresolved_limitations: P3 partition-dependence addendum: unexecuted; not part of the fingerprint qualification
temporal provenance is qualified ONLY for the Boolean pipeline (D-071)
exact direct-edge recovery is qualified ONLY under one-step pulse access (D-071)
AND, NEWLY FOUND HERE: the response representation is qualified ONLY for a BINARY observable
DECISION_REASON: Execution would require modifying the instrument. The frozen fingerprint is undefined on a continuous observable, and supplying the missing quantization / tolerance / amplitude-mapping rules is instrument definition, not adaptation. Per Phase 2: STOP.
